marquee.bismillah: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful
marquee.iqra: Read in the name of your Lord who created
marquee.easy_quran: We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance
marquee.recite: So recite what is easy for you of the Qur'an
marquee.best_people: The best of you are those who learn the Qur'an and teach it
marquee.seek_knowledge: Seeking knowledge is an obligation upon every Muslim
marquee.tajweed: Recite the Qur'an with measured recitation
marquee.hearts: Verily, in the remembrance of Allah hearts find rest
marquee.teach: Convey from me even if it is one verse
